name: Fast Goodies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
2. Fill muffin tins with the batter, filling each cup about 3/4 full.
3. Bake at 450°F for 10-12 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
4. Remove from oven and allow to cool in the pan for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
